title: Subitem Automations Suffix or Prefix Not Included in a Pulse Name to Integrately
excerpt: @Fantasy-Media-Team - I just started using the Subitem Automations app on my Monday CRM. I was using the Prefix/Suffix functionality to add the parent item name to the end of the subitem name. The goal was to use Integra…

posts.author: sbjcmf (Brett Cassel)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Fantasy-Media-Team - I just started using the Subitem Automations app on my Monday CRM. I was using the Prefix/Suffix functionality to add the parent item name to the end of the subitem name. The goal was to use Integrately to then create a task in Todoist for each subitem that included the Parent Item Name.

However, although the automation to create the Prefix/Suffix works well, the subitem name when it lands in Integrately leaves that Prefix or Suffix off. Is this something that you have seen before?

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @sbjcmf, thanks for reaching out!

This sounds like it may be related to how external automations (like Integrately) pick up subitem data, and we’d be happy to take a closer look and help you find the best setup.

Could you please reach out to us directly at hello@fantasymedia.io with a bit more detail about your automation flow?

Looking forward to helping you get this sorted
